2604.05081.title: MedGemma 1.5 Technical Report
2604.05081.paper_summary: We introduce MedGemma 1.5 4B, the latest model in the MedGemma collection. MedGemma 1.5 expands on MedGemma 1 by integrating additional capabilities: high-dimensional medical imaging (CT/MRI volumes and histopathology whole slide images), anatomical localization via bounding boxes, multi-timepoint chest X-ray analysis, and improved medical document understanding (lab reports, electronic health records). We detail the innovations required to enable these modalities within a single architecture, including new training data, long-context 3D volume slicing, and whole-slide pathology sampling. Compared to MedGemma 1 4B, MedGemma 1.5 4B demonstrates significant gains in these new areas, improving 3D MRI condition classification accuracy by 11% and 3D CT condition classification by 3% (absolute improvements). In whole slide pathology imaging, MedGemma 1.5 4B achieves a 47% macro F1 gain. Additionally, it improves anatomical localization with a 35% increase in Intersection over Union on chest X-rays and achieves a 4% macro accuracy for longitudinal (multi-timepoint) chest x-ray analysis. Beyond its improved multimodal performance over MedGemma 1, MedGemma 1.5 improves on text-based clinical knowledge and reasoning, improving by 5% on MedQA accuracy and 22% on EHRQA accuracy. It also achieves an average of 18% macro F1 on 4 different lab report information extraction datasets (EHR Datasets 2, 3, 4, and Mendeley Clinical Laboratory Test Reports). Taken together, MedGemma 1.5 serves as a robust, open resource for the community, designed as an improved foundation on which developers can create the next generation of medical AI systems. Resources and tutorials for building upon MedGemma 1.5 can be found at https://goo.gle/MedGemma.
2604.05081.paper_summary_zh: 我們介紹 MedGemma 1.5 4B，MedGemma 系列中的最新模型。MedGemma 1.5 在 MedGemma 1 的基礎上擴展了額外的功能：高維度醫學影像（CT/MRI 體積和組織病理全片影像）、通過邊界框進行的解剖定位、多時間點胸部 X 光分析，以及改進的醫學文件理解（實驗室報告、電子健康記錄）。我們詳細說明了在單一架構內啟用這些模式所需的創新，包括新的訓練數據、長上下文 3D 體積切片和全片病理取樣。與 MedGemma 1 4B 相比，MedGemma 1.5 4B 在這些新領域顯示出顯著的增益，提高了 3D MRI 病情分類的準確性 11% 和 3D CT 病情分類的準確性 3%（絕對提升）。在全片病理影像中，MedGemma 1.5 4B 實現了 47% 的宏觀 F1 增益。此外，它在胸部 X 光的交集比（Intersection over Union）上提高了 35% 的解剖定位準確性，並在縱向（多時間點）胸部 X 光分析中達到了 4% 的宏觀準確率。除了在多模態性能上優於 MedGemma 1 之外，MedGemma 1.5 在基於文本的臨床知識和推理方面也有所改進，MedQA 準確性提高了 5%，EHRQA 準確性提高了 22%。它在 4 個不同的實驗室報告信息提取數據集（EHR Datasets 2、3、4 和 Mendeley Clinical Laboratory Test Reports）上也達到了平均 18% 的宏觀 F1。綜合來看，MedGemma 1.5 作為一個強大的開放資源服務於社區，旨在成為開發者創建下一代醫療 AI 系統的改進基礎。關於基於 MedGemma 1.5 構建的資源和教程，可以在 https://goo.gle/MedGemma 找到。
2604.05081.author: Andrew Sellergren et.al.
